SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.equipment.powergeneration.gasturbine

Class GasTurbineCatalog

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.equipment.powergeneration.gasturbine.GasTurbineCatalog
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public final class GasTurbineCatalog extends Object implements Serializable
Catalog of typical gas turbine packages used in upstream oil & gas topside power generation. Data is loaded from resources/data/powergeneration/gas_turbine_catalog.csv on first access.

All entries are based on publicly available OEM datasheets and trade press. Use get(String) to retrieve a named entry or findBestFit(double, double) to pick the smallest unit that can deliver a given power demand with the requested redundancy.

Version:
$Id: $Id
Author:
neqsim

  • Constructor Details

    • GasTurbineCatalog

  • Method Details

    • all

      public static Map<String,GasTurbineSpec> all()
      Load the catalog from the bundled CSV resource (lazy, thread safe).
      Returns:
      immutable map from model name to spec

    • get

      public static GasTurbineSpec get(String model)
      Lookup a single entry by model name.
      Parameters:
      model - OEM model identifier (case-insensitive, underscores or spaces accepted)
      Returns:
      matching spec
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if no model with the given name exists

    • sortedByPower

      public static List<GasTurbineSpec> sortedByPower()
      Return all entries sorted by ascending rated power.
      Returns:
      sorted list of catalog entries

    • findBestFit

      public static GasTurbineSpec findBestFit(double demandW, double redundancyFactor)
      Find the smallest catalog entry whose rated power is at least the requested demand multiplied by the safety / redundancy factor.
      Parameters:
      demandW - power demand [W]
      redundancyFactor - multiplier (e.g. 1.0 for 1×100 %, 2.0 for N+1 with two equal units)
      Returns:
      best-fit spec, or null if no entry is large enough

    • findBestFit

      public static GasTurbineSpec findBestFit(double demandW, double redundancyFactor, boolean returnLargestIfNoneFits)
      Find the best-fit single-unit spec for the given demand. When no single catalog entry is large enough and returnLargestIfNoneFits is true, the largest available entry is returned instead (indicating a multi-unit dispatch will be required). When the flag is false, the behaviour matches the two-argument overload and null is returned for infeasible single-unit cases.
      Parameters:
      demandW - power demand [W]
      redundancyFactor - multiplier (e.g. 1.0 for 1×100 %, 2.0 for N+1 with two equal units)
      returnLargestIfNoneFits - if true, fall back to the largest catalog entry when no single unit covers the demand
      Returns:
      best-fit spec, or the largest spec, or null if the catalog is empty

    • normalize

      private static String normalize(String s)

    • loadFromResource

      private static Map<String,GasTurbineSpec> loadFromResource()
